query:
SELECT g.id, g.stageNumber, g.gateType, g.confidenceScore, g.decision, g.decisionSource 
FROM gates g 
JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.gateId = g.id 
WHERE ps.pipelineRunId = 120003 
ORDER BY g.stageNumber LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 24SvJuQr6QY484E.8a2f6c781bb3 --database 4V9sAd2k2m2djZEsU8bXCJ --execute SELECT g.id, g.stageNumber, g.gateType, g.confidenceScore, g.decision, g.decisionSource 
FROM gates g 
JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.gateId = g.id 
WHERE ps.pipelineRunId = 120003 
ORDER BY g.stageNumber LIMIT 20;
